model.mockCatalog.taskContractThreePortS:
# Task contract: three-port Schema contract and verification pipeline

## Target

Create for the three ports of `kernel/ports` (ArtifactStore, ProjectionStore, EngineGateway)
Schema contract: All cross-port data must pass schema verification, and unmapped fields enter the WARNING channel.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] The Effect Schema definition of the three-port interface is completed
- [x] `status_unmapped` WARNING generated in snapshot layer
- [ ] The error message of verification failure includes field path
- [ ] Schema contract check in CI passed

## State mapping example

| external raw | canonical | remarks |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `waiting_local_directory` | `blocked` | Multica waiting for directory binding |
| `open:in-progress` | `active` | GitHub label portfolio |
| `triage_hold` | `unknown` | Not mapped, generates WARNING |

## Key constraints

> `unknown` is not the 7th state: it is the display value of the snapshot layer and cannot be used as a state transition target.
> Cannot be written back to the domain and cannot be used as the default value by the adapter.

```ts
type SnapshotStatus = DomainStatus | "unknown";
```
model.mockCatalog.visualMapWritePathMerm:
# Visual map

## Write path

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  GUI[GUI/CLI] --> SVC[kernel/application]
  SVC --> WC[WriteCoordinator]
  WC --> GIT[(Git SoT)]
  GIT --> PROJ[SQLite projection]
  PROJ --> GUI
```

## Three-axis state machine (coordinationStatus)

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> planned
  planned --> active
  active --> blocked
  blocked --> active
  active --> in_review
  in_review --> done
  in_review --> active : review failed + explicit call back
  planned --> canceled
```
model.mockCatalog.walkthroughOverviewCha:
#Walkthrough

## Overview of changes

1. Add three-port Effect Schema definition to `ports/schema.ts`.
2. The snapshot layer accesses the `status_unmapped` WARNING channel.
3. Verification failure error message with field path (`ParseError.path`).

## Verification method

```bash
pnpm test --filter kernel-ports
pnpm check:import-boundary
```

## Risk and rollback

- Schema tightening may reject old caches: `governance rebuild` fallback has been provided.
- Rollback = revert single commit, no data migration.
